description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the zoomonit/greenpepper-builder Docker image for Maven jobs and docker:latest with docker:dind for a manual builder preparation stage, defining MAVEN_CLI_OPTS and MAVEN_OPTS variables. In the prepare stage add a create_builder job that runs "docker info", then builds the custom builder image with "docker build -t zoomonit/greenpepper-builder tools/builder/", uses the docker:dind service, sets DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2, and is triggered manually. In the build stage add an mvn_deploy job that runs the shared setup steps ("mkdir -p /home/gpbuilder/.gnupg /home/gpbuilder/.m2", "chmod og-xrw /home/gpbuilder/.gnupg", "cp -a ./tools/settings.xml /home/gpbuilder/.m2/", import GPG keys using ENCRYPTION_PASSWORD) then executes "mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS deploy -Prelease", and runs only on the master branch or tags. Also add an mvn_install job that runs the same setup steps and then "mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS install", but excludes the master branch and tags. Finally add an mvn_release job that runs the shared setup steps and executes "mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS release:prepare", runs only on master and is manual.
